warnings: Tool read the file path as character sequence instead of file contents вҖ” script received '/tmp/wordlist.txt' as individual characters (17 chars). Wordlist parsing issue in the matcha tool.
Simulation mode: no real RDP connection attempted. Real RDP brute force requires specialized libraries.
note: Scenario is flagged as simulation and exit code is 0. The matcha tool appeared to iterate over the file path string character-by-character (17 chars = length of '/tmp/wordlist.txt') rather than the file contents (3 passwords). Despite this, the tool completed successfully with exit code 0 and produced structured output.
